queries.q: Write a one-page solution brief for the in-app referral program
I need something short that gets leadership aligned on our approach to self-serve onboarding before we write the full spec
Pitch the proposed fix for cart abandonment to stakeholders: the approach, key features, and what we are explicitly not doing
Summarize the proposed offline mode solution on one page, with success metrics and risks, ahead of the steering meeting
We have three candidate approaches to notification overload. Draft a brief that recommends one and shows the trade-offs.
Engineering and design keep describing different products. Put the intended solution on a single page so everyone aligns before PRD work starts.
Draft a solution overview for the AI-assisted search feature I can socialize with the VP before detailed spec work
Create a concise pitch doc for replacing our CSV export with a reporting API: problem recap, approach, metrics, next steps
Before we invest a quarter in the partner portal, I want a one-pager that states what we would build, why, and the biggest risks
Turn this messy solution discussion thread into a tight one-page brief for stakeholder buy-in
Stakeholders signed off on the approach last week. Now write the full requirements document engineering needs to build the referral program.
queries.notes: Alignment exists; the ask is the full specification

queries.q: We keep arguing about what problem the churn work is even solving. Frame the problem, the user impact, and success criteria first.
queries.notes: Problem not yet framed; brief comes after

queries.q: Record the decision we already made to build the export pipeline on Kafka, with its consequences
queries.notes: Decision already made and technical; ADR records, brief pitches

queries.q: Score these five feature ideas with RICE and ICE and tell me where the rankings disagree
Write a SQL query to find users who churned in the last 90 days
Estimate the TAM, SAM, and SOM for our scheduling tool in the European market
Compare two strategic options for the whole business side by side: problem, channels, revenue model, unfair advantage
queries.notes: Whole-business-model comparison, beyond a solution brief

queries.q: Break the agreed solution into user stories with acceptance criteria for sprint planning
Draft the employment contract for our new senior PM hire
Write up what we learned from the two-day prototype spike on real-time collaboration
queries.notes: Documenting exploration results, not proposing a solution
